'''鈭歵h-r-s''' ('''katharas''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:umbrate|umbrate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-r-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:umbrate|umbrate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歵h-r-s
|-
! Lemma
| katharas
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thitharas|thitharas]] || [[word:jitharas|jitharas]] || [[word:shitharas|shitharas]] || [[word:kitharas|kitharas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthutharas|thuthutharas]] || [[word:jujutharas|jujutharas]] || [[word:shushutharas|shushutharas]] || [[word:kukutharas|kukutharas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thutharas|thutharas]] || [[word:jutharas|jutharas]] || [[word:shutharas|shutharas]] || [[word:kutharas|kutharas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thutharas|thutharas]] || [[word:jutharas|jutharas]] || [[word:shutharas|shutharas]] || [[word:kutharas|kutharas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thetharas|thetharas]] || [[word:jetharas|jetharas]] || [[word:shetharas|shetharas]] || [[word:ketharas|ketharas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothotharas|thothotharas]] || [[word:jojotharas|jojotharas]] || [[word:shoshotharas|shoshotharas]] || [[word:kokotharas|kokotharas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thotharas|thotharas]] || [[word:jotharas|jotharas]] || [[word:shotharas|shotharas]] || [[word:kotharas|kotharas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thotharas|thotharas]] || [[word:jotharas|jotharas]] || [[word:shotharas|shotharas]] || [[word:kotharas|kotharas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙tharas|th忙tharas]] || [[word:j忙tharas|j忙tharas]] || [[word:sh忙tharas|sh忙tharas]] || [[word:k忙tharas|k忙tharas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathatharas|thathatharas]] || [[word:jajatharas|jajatharas]] || [[word:shashatharas|shashatharas]] || [[word:kakatharas|kakatharas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thatharas|thatharas]] || [[word:jatharas|jatharas]] || [[word:shatharas|shatharas]] || [[word:katharas|katharas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thatharas|thatharas]] || [[word:jatharas|jatharas]] || [[word:shatharas|shatharas]] || [[word:katharas|katharas]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shatharas|shatharas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshatharas|goshatharas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishatharas|gokishatharas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shatharasn眉|shatharasn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshatharasnkn眉|goshatharasnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishatharasn眉|gokishatharasn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shatharash毛|shatharash毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshatharasnksh毛|goshatharasnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishatharash毛|gokishatharash毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatharasro|shatharasro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatharasnkro|goshatharasnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatharasro|gokishatharasro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shatharasmu|shatharasmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatharasnkmu|goshatharasnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatharasmu|gokishatharasmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shatharasher|shatharasher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshatharasnksher|goshatharasnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishatharasher|gokishatharasher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shatharasng|shatharasng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshatharasnkng|goshatharasnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishatharasng|gokishatharasng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shatharasya|shatharasya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshatharasnkya|goshatharasnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishatharasya|gokishatharasya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shatharasyam|shatharasyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshatharasnkyam|goshatharasnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishatharasyam|gokishatharasyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatharasn眉sh毛|shatharasn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatharasnkn眉sh毛|goshatharasnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatharasn眉sh毛|gokishatharasn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatharasn眉ro|shatharasn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatharasnkn眉ro|goshatharasnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatharasn眉ro|gokishatharasn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatharasn眉mu|shatharasn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatharasnkn眉mu|goshatharasnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatharasn眉mu|gokishatharasn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatharash毛n眉|shatharash毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatharasnksh毛n眉|goshatharasnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatharash毛n眉|gokishatharash毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatharash毛ro|shatharash毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatharasnksh毛ro|goshatharasnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatharash毛ro|gokishatharash毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatharash毛mu|shatharash毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatharasnksh毛mu|goshatharasnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatharash毛mu|gokishatharash毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatharasron眉|shatharasron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatharasnkron眉|goshatharasnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatharasron眉|gokishatharasron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatharasrosh毛|shatharasrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatharasnkrosh毛|goshatharasnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatharasrosh毛|gokishatharasrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatharasromu|shatharasromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatharasnkromu|goshatharasnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatharasromu|gokishatharasromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatharasmun眉|shatharasmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatharasnkmun眉|goshatharasnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatharasmun眉|gokishatharasmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatharasmush毛|shatharasmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatharasnkmush毛|goshatharasnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatharasmush毛|gokishatharasmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatharasmuro|shatharasmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatharasnkmuro|goshatharasnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatharasmuro|gokishatharasmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
